label: Semi-supervised & weak supervision

node.label: Semi-supervised & weak supervision
node.definition: Limited, noisy, heuristic, or indirect labels are combined with unlabeled data.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Semi-supervised & weak supervision is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Unsupervised learning and feeding downstream nodes such as Medical imaging & clinical decision support, Computer vision, perception & scene understanding.
examples: atlas downstream link to Medical imaging & clinical decision support
atlas downstream link to Computer vision, perception & scene understanding
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Unsupervised learning.

dependencies.rationale: Semi-supervised & weak supervision follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Semi-supervised & weak supervision follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.

In this atlas graph, Semi-supervised & weak supervision has a `uses` dependency on Labels, targets, rewards & preferences because Labels, targets, rewards & preferences is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
